message.content:
Thoroughly explore the collabspace-server project at D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server. I need to understand:

3. Key frameworks used (Spring Boot version, MyBatis, etc.)
4. Application configuration (application.yml/properties)
5. Architecture patterns (controller/service/mapper layers, etc.)

9. Key domain modules/packages

Read the build.gradle.kts, settings.gradle.kts, gradle/libs.versions.toml, README.md, .gitlab-ci.yml, application config files, and explore the src directory structure. Give me a comprehensive summary.
